Featured
June 2024
Arman Tsarukyan ignites massive brawl after punching Georgio Poullas at RAF 6
In a fight five years in the making, Arman Tsarukyan took Islam Makhachev the full championship distance in a war that will be remembered as one of the great title fights in UFC history. Though the decision went to the champion, Tsarukyan left Newark as a proven world-class fighter and the undisputed next challenger.
Read Full Story →
